items.name: booking-calendar
items.title: Booking Calendar
items.description: Multi-room booking calendar with tap-to-move room shift, guest name/source display, colSpan bars, and mobile scroll. Includes ReservationDetail with room-shift dropdown.

items.name: settings-module
items.title: Settings Module
items.description: Hospitality settings panel with searchable VAT circle dropdown (Bangladesh NBR data), tenant logo upload/branding card, and tax configuration.

items.name: supabase-rls-helpers
items.title: Supabase RLS Helpers
items.description: SQL migration patterns for multi-tenant RLS policies using current_tenant_id() and is_admin() helper functions. Includes FK index setup.
